
# format string exploit {visibility="hidden"}

## format strings and the stack {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /overflow-format/_format-view-stack.qmd >}}

## printf writes! {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /overflow-format/_format-printf-writes.qmd >}}

## vulnerable code {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /overflow-format/_format-exploit-example.qmd >}}

## exploit with RA {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /overflow-format/_format-exploit-ra.qmd >}}

## splitting the write {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /overflow-format/_format-exploit-ra-parts.qmd >}}

## format exploit defense: FORTIFY_SOURCE {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /overflow-format/_format-exploit-fortify.qmd >}}
